chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-6407 of 2022 M/S. Apex Pharmaceuticals (Private) Limited Versus Federation of Pakistan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For order on office objections. 2. For hearing on Misc. No.1945/2019. 3. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 05.08.2024 Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khaleeq Ahmed, D.A.G..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Mamoon N. Chaudhry, learned counsel for the petitioner on instructions does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed along with pending application(s). CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
